{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165814F0340C930A2872C6DDEC"}"},"total":1120},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7534343601243521854","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"豪堪！宋宋的美貌不容置疑！更是要脑子有脑子，要武力有武力！小道消息！水晶球的本体是^^！wen先生播放一则秘闻––某审判长私下竟与玩家宋某发生不正当关系！究竟是道德的沦丧还是人性的扭曲？且看正文内容了解详情^^"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754231873,"group_id":"7367051396115336216","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"（闻时，谢俞重度依赖）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+/cXBBDV7VZeOVg1chRKu0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9dab85260dca457f866d32e3d07bc3d6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537029&x-signature=XzhEGGNG3k%2BJiYBJXpC1r4FHJBM%3D","user_id":"6552037852","user_name":"wenyuuu"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6552037852","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7367051396115336216","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主＋惊悚游戏＋品类丰富的监管者BOSS＋智力武力双高·破解游戏】
不知道什么品种的受×为爱掏心掏肺神明攻
世界陷入黑暗。
神明游戏，成神之路。
祸启者匿而不出。
审判者高高在上，监管者疯狂杀戮。
神眷者张狂地笑，备选者尖叫求生。
暴动者撕扯下血淋淋的头颅，幸福地咀嚼。
异端者潜伏暗中，伺机策划一切。
叛神者是锋利的刃，破坏游戏，撕碎虚伪的假象。
巨兽在黑暗苏醒，凶猛地咆哮捕猎，染血的牙齿是将落的庞大铡刀。
可爱的小鸟满是缝合的粗劣针脚。
是谁？
拔掉我的羽毛，刨开我的肚子，又将我与野猫一起无情缝合。
你是否看到一个跳跃的猩红的心脏。
双马尾萝莉向你索要糖果，玫瑰伯爵的心事被埋葬。
塔罗牌倾倒，红舞鞋踢嗒响起，女巫的黑猫跃上绅士的礼帽。
海妖在吟唱，园丁的鲜花流了血，马戏团团长又在咆哮发脾气。
面目狰狞的监管者长着一张纯白恐怖的无脸面容，贪婪地吞咽声在耳边响起，温柔诡异的瞳孔注视神爱者。
“你身上有神的气息。”
听。
水晶球在窃窃私语，炙热的爱意于黑暗中吐露。
灰姑娘丢失的水晶鞋穿在谁的脚上？
旋转起华丽的裙摆，口吐人言的小鸟衔来了雪白的头纱。
手捧起玫瑰的花束，成为神明的新娘吧！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/265b498b06360fc4489a9b70ca8a801a","author":"橘芝雪艳","author_id":"","book_id":"7367051396115336216","book_name":"欢迎进入神明游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0b0b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7367286308277862936","read_count":"30446","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"720758"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"325","tags":"双男主,系统,穿越,异世穿越,惊悚游戏,现代,纯爱,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oeef678f9b2ff8701672ac20b57ffcd64~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181094&x-signature=kkqaiyTAI45AiNyLpTMwVfVLEoE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3090071988232192","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"383 "},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165814F0340C930A2872C6DDEC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19003,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":20356},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7475918696092615449","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"喜欢主角的设定，最俊的绝世容颜万人迷，有强悍的武力值，不是废物美人。神明对主角赤烈的爱意还有无限的宠溺和痴迷，也有一丢丢的强制，啊啊啊看的人都酥酥麻麻了[飞吻][飞吻][害羞][害羞][害羞][饱了][饱了]，不过就是游戏场景过于密集，中间衔接的现实世界部分剧情略敷衍，还有挺多坑和谜题希望后面能快点看到，作者快快更新啦啦啦！！","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":15,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399709472C6DDEC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227475918696092615449%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227367051396115336216%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740627328,"group_id":"7367051396115336216","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2BfAEI9HCCh8TvxfPWPdUmKrsvRFG2duBloJRpf6oBy","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3a6693c052de432caee6b0054bd9dd95~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537857&x-signature=r7lG%2B0%2FAJJLa4tf6%2F9WNAiAFRRs%3D","user_id":"3274815844388368","user_name":"幻梦旅者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3274815844388368","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,
